channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kerala election 2026: Officials consider adding more counting tables in Paravur to avoid delay in result declaration
item.description: For the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections, polling officials in Ernakulam district are considering increasing the number of vote‑counting tables allotted to the Paravur Assembly constituency, where Oppos...

item.title: Key players set to influence Soweto derby between Orlando Pirates and Kaizer Chiefs
item.description: Orlando Pirates and Kaizer Chiefs are set to renew their fierce rivalry in the Soweto derby at FNB Stadium, with Pirates looking to extend their recent dominance after winning the last five league mee...

item.title: Armed suspect arrested after shooting incident disrupts White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: An armed suspect was taken into custody after a shooting incident disrupted the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, DC, where President Donald Trump, cabinet members, journalists, and gu...

item.title: Obasanjo Appreciates IGP Disu For Support During 1995 House Arrest
item.description: Former President Olusegun Obasanjo don open mouth to thank Inspector-General of Police, Olatunji Disu, for wetin e do during the time wey he dey under house arrest in 1995 under Sani Abacha regime. Fo...

item.title: Opposition Parties Raise Alarm Over APC, Demand INEC Chairman’s Removal and Election Reforms
item.description: For Naija, ten opposition parties, including PDP, LP, ADC, NNPP, and Accord Party, don gather for National Summit for Ibadan to raise alarm say APC dey try turn Naija to one-party state. Dem release s...

item.title: Manitoba proposes first-in-Canada restrictions on youth access to social media and AI tools
item.description: The Manitoba government, led by Premier Wab Kinew, has announced plans to introduce legislation that would restrict young people’s access to social media platforms and artificial intelligence chatbots...

item.title: JM Ibarra explains purpose of topless scene in ‘Almost Us,’ says it serves the story
item.description: In an exclusive feature, actors JM Ibarra and Fyang Smith shared insights about a much-talked-about topless scene in their project “Almost Us.” According to the two, the scene was not included merely ...

item.title: Marcos assures continuity of government services amid energy crisis, emphasizes 4PH housing rollout
item.description: President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. assured the public that government services will continue uninterrupted despite the country’s ongoing energy crisis, stressing that public service must not be...

item.title: Suspect Identified in White House Correspondents’ Dinner Shooting Incident
item.description: Authorities in the United States have identified Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old man from Torrance, California, as the suspect involved in a shooting incident at the White House Correspondents’ Associ...

item.title: Rising River Temperatures Increase Feeding Rates of Invasive Northern Pike in Alaska
item.description: Rising temperatures in Alaska’s freshwater systems are significantly altering predator-prey dynamics, particularly involving invasive northern pike and native salmon populations. A study led by the Un...

item.title: No charges filed against Sara Duterte over confidential funds misuse and unexplained wealth, says Ridon
item.description: The issue of misuse of confidential funds and unexplained wealth against Vice President Sara Duterte has been officially closed, according to former Kabataan Party-list representative Terry Ridon. In ...

item.title: Tanzania invests in DNA technology to improve data security and local research capacity
item.description: The Government of Tanzania has taken a strong step to protect citizens’ genetic information by investing Sh3.5 billion in modern DNA technology and setting aside more than Sh1.1 billion annually for e...

item.title: Flood Hits Jalingo Despite Taraba State Receiving Over N2 Billion Ecological Fund
item.description: Even though Taraba State collected more than N2.2 billion from the federal Ecological Fund in 2025, Jalingo still faced serious flooding on Saturday. Heavy rain from 2:30 a.m. to 11:30 a.m. caused par...

item.title: Body of 12-year-old recovered after drowning in Karachi water line during swimming
item.description: Rescue teams in Karachi have recovered the body of a 12-year-old boy, Zahid Mohammed Khan, who was swept away while swimming in a major water line in Scheme 33. The incident occurred around 2pm on Fri...

item.title: FWO restarts stalled Karachi Red Line BRT work as Sindh government sets 90-day deadline
item.description: Work on Karachi’s long-delayed Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) Red Line project has been restarted, with the Frontier Works Organisation (FWO) taking charge of construction activities on University Road. Kara...

item.title: Virginia Giuffre remembered at Washington DC vigil one year after her passing
item.description: Friends, family, and supporters gathered in Washington DC to commemorate the first anniversary of Virginia Giuffre's death, reflecting on her courage in speaking out against sexual abuse. Giuffre, who...

item.title: President Ruto Jokes About Nigeria's English, Responding to Tinubu's Remarks
item.description: Kenya's President William Ruto took a lighthearted jab at Nigeria’s spoken English during a recent event, claiming that it often requires a translator. His playful comment came as a response to Nigeri...

item.title: LTFRB distributes over P27 million in fuel aid to taxi drivers in final payout
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) announced that over P27 million in fuel subsidies was distributed to taxi drivers on the second and final day of payouts under the gove...

item.title: Starmer's Future as Prime Minister Under Threat Amid Labour Party Struggles and Upcoming Elections
item.description: Keir Starmer, the Prime Minister of the UK, has claimed he intends to remain in power into the 2030s, despite growing unrest within the Labour Party. Starmer’s leadership faces serious scrutiny, parti...

item.title: St Kilda Saints dominate West Coast Eagles with first triple-digit win since 2015
item.description: St Kilda delivered their most commanding performance of the season on Sunday, thrashing the West Coast Eagles by 101 points at Marvel Stadium. The Saints’ 22-goal haul marked their first win by over 1...
